name: tasktreat
description: TaskTreat — Jira-style task tracker with a weekly reward twist. Monorepo: React/Vite frontend + 3 TypeScript/Express/Prisma microservices.

scripts.db:migrate: npm -w task-service run db:migrate && npm -w wishlist-service run db:migrate && npm -w reward-service run db:migrate
scripts.db:seed: npm -w task-service run db:seed && npm -w wishlist-service run db:seed && npm -w reward-service run db:seed
scripts.build: npm -w task-service run build && npm -w wishlist-service run build && npm -w reward-service run build && npm -w frontend run build
